Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Gadrael]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Gadrael is the Second Judge of the Abidan Court and Makiel’s loyal right hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Mantle of Gadrael is a cape of pure starfire worn by Gadrael.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Gadrael is a Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Gadrael does not smile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Gadrael carries a black buckler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Gadrael's mission is mercy.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Gadrael is a compact and muscular man with dusky blue skin and tight-packed horns instead of hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Gadrael wears liquid-smooth white armor and a Judge's Mantle.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Gadrael is someone Makiel might send.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Gadrael's isolation has ended.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Gadrael is a Titan.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Gadrael is a Judge known as the Titan.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Gadrael had a second generation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Gadrael's cartilage is sturdier than most planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Gadrael wears smooth white armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Gadrael possesses the Shield of the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The Shield of the Titan is a bulwark of gleaming steel with red-hot veins like molten metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — A previous generation of Gadrael set up script-formations to seal Asylum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Gadrael warned Suriel that she will stand trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Gadrael is an Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Gadrael took a blow from the Scythe on his shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Gadrael is a stone-faced man among the seven Abidan figures.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Gadrael is the Titan who sealed Ozriel's mouth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Gadrael reinforced the defenses around the Seat of the Accused.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael is a Titan and the second of the Court of Seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael has grayish skin and short spikes on his scalp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael can bind, burden, and warn others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael binds Lindon to his mission, preventing him from seeking power beyond what he has, undermining world stability, or contacting his Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael burdens Lindon with the weight of their cause.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael warns Lindon and his associates that betrayal will result in execution or censure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael has blue eyes containing a spark of the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael has the authority to perform immediate executions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael is a Judge whose attention on Lindon has complicated things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael is an Abidan who Lindon thought would act personally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael is a Judge who may punish the Abidan for breaking rules.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael is a Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael is a Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael is a Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Gadrael judged Lindon's actions and found him innocent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Gadrael discussed giving up his seat on the Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Gadrael is one of the Judges.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
